description_long: This doll features a stylized, minimalist design with a large, rounded head and long, upright ears reminiscent of a rabbit or bunny. The face is dominated by a single, large, circular black eye at the center, flanked by two pale blue cheek spots, giving it a whimsical and slightly robotic appearance. The body is compact and rounded, tapering at the waist and widening at the hips, with a small spherical tail at the back. The surface appears smooth and matte, with a soft, plush-like texture, suggesting it is made primarily of fabric or foam. The color palette is predominantly white, with subtle accents of black and blue. There are no visible limbs or clothing details, emphasizing the toy's simple and modern aesthetic.
description: A minimalist white doll with long upright ears, a single large black eye, and blue cheek spots, featuring a smooth, plush-like surface and a rounded body.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the head, long ears, and a small round tail at the base of the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, the protruding ear, and the spherical tail, with a hint of the blue cheek spot visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large central black eye, blue cheek spots, and the full shape of the head and body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the head, ear, and tail, with the blue cheek spot partially visible.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll's body is a single, seamless white surface with no garments or textile patterns.
attribute_pose: The doll is in a static, upright position with its head and long ears pointing upward, body centered, and no visible arms or legs.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with a single large black eye and blue cheek spots; no mouth or eyebrows are present.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and featureless except for the ears.
